{/* Header Title & Subtitle */}

Send Me a Message

setFormData({...formData, name: e.target.value})} className="bg-dark/50 border border-textPrimary/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-[13px] text-textPrimary focus:outline-none focus:border-primary transition-colors placeholder:text-textSecondary/50 shadow-inner" />
setFormData({...formData, email: e.target.value})} className="bg-dark/50 border border-textPrimary/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-[13px] text-textPrimary focus:outline-none focus:border-primary transition-colors placeholder:text-textSecondary/50 shadow-inner" />
{formData.message.length}/1000

); }; export default Contact;
